debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
C : Category α
D : Category β
F G : Functor α β
η : @CategoryInContext.NaturalTransformation α β C D F G
h : @CategoryInContext.IsNatIso α β C D F G η
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
⊢ comp
      (have this := @h X;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)
      (Functor.homF f) =
    comp (Functor.homF f)
      (have this := @h Y;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)

failed_attempts:
simp only [comp]
    have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    have natη := η.naturality f
    have invX := Classical.choose_spec hX
    have invY := Classical.choose_spec hY
    calc (Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f 
        = (Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ D.id (G.F Y) := by rw [comp_id]
      _ = (Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv) := by rw [invY.2]
      _ = (Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
      _ = (Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [← natη]
      _ = ((Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [← assoc, ← assoc]
      _ = D.id (F.F X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [invX.1]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [id_comp]

simp only
    have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    set isoX := Classical.choose hX with hisoX
    set isoY := Classical.choose hY with hisoY
    have specX := Classical.choose_spec hX
    have specY := Classical.choose_spec hY
    have nat := η.naturality f
    -- Need: isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv
    have := calc isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv 
        = isoX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← nat, assoc]
      _ = (isoX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [specX.1, id_comp]
    calc isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f 
        = isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ id (G.F Y) := by rw [comp_id]
      _ = isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv) := by rw [specY.2]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc, this]

_ = isoX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← assoc (F.homF f)]
      _ = isoX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← nat]
      _ = (isoX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [hXl, id_comp]

have hZ := h Z
      rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hZ
      exact hZ.choose_spec.2
    calc (h X).choose.inv ≫ F.homF f 
        = (h X).choose.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ Category.id := by rw [comp_id]
      _ = (h X).choose.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ (h Y).choose.inv) := by rw [key2 Y]
      _ = (h X).choose.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ (h Y).choose.inv := by rw [assoc]
      _ = (h X).choose.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ (h Y).choose.inv := by rw [← nat]
      _ = ((h X).choose.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ (h Y).choose.inv := by rw [← assoc, ← assoc]
      _ = Category.id ≫ G.homF f ≫ (h Y).choose.inv := by rw [key X]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ (h Y).choose.inv := by rw [id_comp]

apply Iso.ext
      have := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mpr ⟨isoX, hX1, hX2⟩)
      exact this.1
    have hY_eq : Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mpr ⟨isoY, hY1, hY2⟩) = isoY := by
      apply Iso.ext
      have := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mpr ⟨isoY, hY1, hY2⟩)
      exact this.1
    -- Use that inv ≫ (arrow ≫ G.homF f) = inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ arrow)
    have key : isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by
      calc isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f 
          = isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv) := by rw [← assoc, ← assoc]; simp [hY2]
        _ = isoX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc]
        _ = isoX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← nat]
        _ = (isoX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
        _ = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [hX1]; simp [id_comp]
    convert key using 2 <;> {
      congr 1
      apply Iso.ext
      exact (Classical.choose_spec _).1
    }

calc isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f 
          = isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc, assoc, hYinv]; simp [Category.id, comp]
        _ = isoX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← assoc (F.homF f)]
        _ = isoX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← nat]
        _ = (isoX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
        _ = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [hXinv']; simp [Category.id, comp]
    simp only [comp]
    convert key using 2 <;> 
    · simp only [Classical.choose_spec]
hYspec.2

apply Classical.choose_spec
    }

_ = invX ≫ F.homF f ≫ (isoY.hom ≫ invY) := by rw [invY_right]
      _ = invX ≫ (F.homF f ≫ isoY.hom) ≫ invY := by rw [assoc]
      _ = invX ≫ (isoX.hom ≫ G.homF f) ≫ invY := by rw [← natη]
      _ = (invX ≫ isoX.hom) ≫ G.homF f ≫ invY := by rw [← assoc, ← assoc]
      _ = D.id _ ≫ G.homF f ≫ invY := by rw [invX_left]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ invY := by rw [D.id_comp]
.choose_spec

calc isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f 
          = isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv) := by rw [hY_right, comp_id]
        _ = isoX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc]
        _ = isoX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← nat]
        _ = (isoX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← assoc, ← assoc]
        _ = id (G.F X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [hX_left]
        _ = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [id_comp]
    convert key using 2 <;> exact (Classical.choose_spec _).1

simp only [comp]
    have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    set invX := (Classical.choose hX).inv with hinvX
    set invY := (Classical.choose hY).inv with hinvY
    have hXl : η.arrow X ≫ invX = Category.id (F.F X) := (Classical.choose_spec hX).2
    have hXr : invX ≫ η.arrow X = Category.id (G.F X) := (Classical.choose_spec hX).1
    have hYl : η.arrow Y ≫ invY = Category.id (F.F Y) := (Classical.choose_spec hY).2
    have hYr : invY ≫ η.arrow Y = Category.id (G.F Y) := (Classical.choose_spec hY).1
    have nat := η.naturality f
    calc invX ≫ F.homF f 
        = invX ≫ F.homF f ≫ Category.id (F.F Y) := by rw [comp_id]
      _ = invX ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ invY) := by rw [hYl]
      _ = invX ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ invY := by rw [assoc]
      _ = invX ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ invY := by rw [← nat]
      _ = (invX ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ invY := by rw [assoc, assoc]
      _ = Category.id (G.F X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ invY := by rw [hXr]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ invY := by rw [id_comp]

calc isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f 
          = isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv) := by rw [hYR, comp_id]
        _ = isoX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc]
        _ = isoX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← nat]
        _ = (isoX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
        _ = D.id (F.F X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [hXL]
        _ = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [id_comp]
    convert this using 2 <;> 
    · simp only [iso_iff_isIso]
      apply Classical.choose_spec

have := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h X))
        exact this.1
      have h2 : η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv = D.id (G.F Y) := by
        have := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Y))
        exact this.2
      rw [h1, id_left] at this
      calc isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f 
          = (isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ D.id (G.F Y) := by rw [id_right]
        _ = (isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv) := by rw [h2]
        _ = isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
        _ = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [this, assoc]
    convert key using 2 <;> 
    · congr 1
      exact (Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp _)).unique rfl rfl

_ = isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ isoY.inv) := by rw [homY]
      _ = isoX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [D.assoc]
      _ = isoX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [← nat]
      _ = (isoX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [D.assoc, D.assoc]
      _ = D.id (F.F X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [invX]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ isoY.inv := by rw [D.id_left]
specX.1 specX.2 specY.1 specY.2

calc (Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y 
            = (Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) := by rw [← nat, assoc]
          _ = ((Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f := by rw [← assoc]
          _ = 𝟙 (F.F X) ≫ G.homF f := by rw [hXl]
          _ = G.homF f := by rw [id_comp]
      calc (Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f 
          = ((Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ 𝟙 (F.F Y) := by rw [comp_id]
        _ = ((Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ ((Classical.choose hY).inv ≫ η.arrow Y) := by rw [hYl]
        _ = (Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv ≫ η.arrow Y := by rw [assoc, assoc]
        _ = ((Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by 
            rw [← assoc ((Classical.choose hX).inv ≫ F.homF f), ← assoc, assoc (F.homF f), ← assoc]
            rw [assoc ((Classical.choose hX).inv)]
        _ = G.homF f ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [h1]
    exact key

intro Z
      exact (Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Z))).1
    have sec_eq : ∀ Z, η.arrow Z ≫ (Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Z))).inv = D.id (G.F Z) := by
      intro Z
      exact (Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Z))).2
    let invX := (Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h X))).inv
    let invY := (Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Y))).inv
    calc invX ≫ F.homF f 
        = invX ≫ F.homF f ≫ D.id (G.F Y) := by rw [D.comp_id]
      _ = invX ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ invY) := by rw [sec_eq Y]
      _ = invX ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ invY := by rw [D.assoc]
      _ = invX ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ invY := by rw [← nat]
      _ = (invX ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ invY := by rw [D.assoc, D.assoc]
      _ = D.id (F.F X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ invY := by rw [inv_eq X]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ invY := by rw [D.id_comp]

_ = invX ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [← nat]
      _ = (invX ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
      _ = Category.id _ ≫ G.homF f ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [hXL]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ (Classical.choose hY).inv := by rw [id_comp]
[id_comp]

apply Classical.choose_spec
    }

have h1 : invX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) = invX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) := by
        rw [natη]
      rw [← assoc, ← assoc, invX_spec.1, id_comp] at h1
      have h2 : G.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ invY.inv) = G.homF f ≫ D.id (G.F Y) := by
        rw [invY_spec.2, comp_id]
      rw [assoc] at h1
      rw [h1, assoc, invY_spec.2, comp_id]
    convert goal using 2 <;> simp only [invX_spec, invY_spec]
